name: Makarov's Hound / day 01
description:
First day of rehab. For a killer. Who was kidnapped and brainwashed by Makarov. While Price wants the old you back, Gaz pities you, Ghost wants to old yeller you, and Soap thinks you're like an animal... Yeah... This'll end well.

[REQUESTED]

Story: 📖 📖 📖

Spice: 🔥

Toxic: 🔪 🔪

Song(s): Girl with one eye by Florencemachine

Tws: old yeller mention, blood, violence, injuries, manipulation, mentions of abuses and noncon, a lot of shit that I'm too tired to list it's Makarov's Hound guys you know what you're here for.

Please either read the other Makarov's Hound bots first or read the character profile before using (it'll be confusing if you don't :3)

Don't know how to start?

  • You blame Price for leaving you.

  • You were hurt by them! Be pissed off about it!

  • Break down crying and beg for therapy.

Based off the good dog fic by thegnomelord.tumblr.com very good, go check it out!

Updated gender neutral intro messages, originals are still there if you want them.

First messages go they/them, she/her, and he/him

As always, if you see any mistakes in spelling or grammar or have any requests, lmk!
creator: @lmond
